reason: PowerShell/pwsh contract covers Windows PTY creation, runtime monitoring, and xterm boundary behavior; needed to understand which backend rules already exist for this terminal bug.
Terminal tab drag and xterm option constraints inform how to adjust XTermTerminal without rebuilding it or breaking related UI behavior.
Terminal store owns shell/runtime state and session lifecycle; needed to avoid scope regressions when changing shell-specific behavior.
Contains required patterns for buffered terminal output and manual verification expectations relevant to terminal UI changes.
